事業成長の推進、ゲーム開発者への支援、革新的なゲームソリューションの普及拡大 に情熱をお持ちで、ゲームエコシステムの中でインパクトのあるパートナーシップ構築が好きな方であれば、ぜひご応募ください！

Die Unternehmen der n-komm Firmengruppe stehen für innovative IT-Lösungen und langjährige Erfahrung in der Digitalisierung von Geschäftsprozessen. jobs.title: Join MoonPay's Talent Pool
jobs.description:
Don’t see an open role that matches your experience right now? We’d still love to hear from you.

By joining MoonPay’s Talent Pool, you can share your profile with us and be considered for future opportunities that align with your skills and interests. Our teams are constantly growing, and new roles open up regularly.
If a position becomes available that could be a great fit, we’ll reach out directly. Until then, your details will stay on file so you’re top of mind when the right opportunity comes along.

🚀 Join our talent pool and be part of MoonPay’s future.

Hi, we’re Otherlife. We’re here to design how people experience the next era of the internet. We work at the intersection of culture, design, and emerging technology.

Why?

Because design is how people connect with new technology. As Web3 and digital identity grow, we need experiences that are clear, simple, and easy to use. <div class="content-intro"><p>At Algolia, we’re proud to be a pioneer and market leader in AI Search, empowering 17,000+ businesses to deliver blazing-fast, predictive search and browse experiences at internet scale. Every week, we power over 30 billion search requests — four times more than Microsoft Bing, Yahoo, Baidu, Yandex, and DuckDuckGo combined.</p>

jobs.description:
<p><strong>About the Role</strong></p>
<p>We’re hiring a Brand Partnerships Manager to help shape Chime into a generational brand and cultural icon.
